race.comment: This race has taken a bit of a hit from scratchings and it leaves the resuming RODRIQUEZ (6) looking nicely placed. He's built a nice record and should track up just behind the speed for Stackhouse who could even have the option to hold the front. Expect he goes close from there. DELICATE LADY (3) ran okay first up in a Saturday race at Caulfield and should be fitter. Back to 1000m here is perhaps a little niggle but she's a talented mare who will be hard to hold out. HONOR GALORE (7) didn't have the best run here last time but her best form is well placed in this. The second to Extragalactic three back reads well. ELECTRIC STAR (11) is racing well and off a narrow win, respecting.
